  "brief_explanation": "The income tax benefit for stock-based compensation in 2010 was $-6.3 million, and the total share-based compensation cost was $18.1 million. The percent is calculated as ($6.3 / $18.1) * 100 = -34.9%, which rounds to -35%."

financial_answer.brief_explanation: The income tax benefit for stock-based compensation in 2010 was $-6.3 million, and the total share-based compensation cost was $18.1 million. The percent is calculated as ($6.3 / $18.1) * 100 = -34.9%, which rounds to -35%.
